judgements.reason: Reasoning (MCPwn CVE-2026-33032 KEV listing precondition, OWASP MCP Top 10 + MCP-over-mTLS / OAuth scope spec consequence, MCP Gateway / Firewall vendor rollout through Q4, audit-category landing Q3 2026) holds. No contradict signals.

Seven bridges Apr 26 - May 2 support the prediction across because/so_that dimensions. The May 2 rel=1 dim=because (Agent 365 GA wires MCP-server allow/block into M365 admin) is an operational counterpart, correctly tagged as marginal rather than core. No retraction or contradict.

Three Needs (MCP standards lead at Anthropic/MS/Google/Cisco/Cloudflare; OWASP MCP Top 10 chair; MCP Gateway/Firewall product leads at Keycard/Okta/Wiz/Levo/Pillar) all status=open. mTLS + OAuth scope draft specs not yet ratified; OWASP MCP Top 10 not yet published; gateway/firewall products are partial (Operant, Okta) but not Q4 rollout breadth yet.

Eight chain edges and six relations created May 5; parallel ties to 7db9cba (AI-Infra CVE sub-catalog) and a2dde9d6 (MCP control-plane arc) are coherent. No upstream contradicted; no equivalent relation requiring evidence transfer in.
